---
title: "Electricity Consumption Histograms"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, fig.show = "show")
```

```{r config-and-libraries, include=FALSE}
library(here)
library(dplyr)

# Load config and functions
source(here("config.R"))
source(here("3_Analysis", "functions", "histogram_cont_var_func.r"))

# Output directory
hist_dir <- file.path(OUTPUT, "6_Histograms")
dir.create(hist_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
```

```{r load-data}
df <- read.csv(file.path(CLEAN_DATA, "final_dataset.csv"))
```

```{r create-vars}
# Create MNF variable
df <- df %>% mutate(MNF = ifelse(faculty == "Faculty of Science (MNF)", 1, 0))
```

```{r separate-bl-el}
# Restrict df to only those labgroupids with BL and EL data
df_sample <- df %>%
  group_by(labgroupid) %>%
  filter(n() == 2) %>%
  ungroup()

# Separate BL and EL
df_bl_all <- df %>% filter(survey == "BL")
df_bl_sample <- df_sample %>% filter(survey == "BL")
df_el <- df %>% filter(survey == "EL")
```

# Overall Distribution

```{r overall-bl}
# BL overall - all groups
make_histogram(
  df       = df_bl_all,
  variable = "annual_electricity_total",
  x_label  = "Annual Electricity Consumption (kWh)",
  output_file = "hist_electricity_bl_overall.pdf",
  binwidth     = 10000,
  boundary     = 0,
  show_median  = TRUE,
  output_dir   = hist_dir
)
```

```{r overall-bl-sample}
# BL overall - sample with BL and EL data
make_histogram(
  df       = df_bl_sample,
  variable = "annual_electricity_total",
  x_label  = "Annual Electricity Consumption (kWh)",
  output_file = "hist_electricity_bl_overall_sample.pdf",
  binwidth     = 10000,
  boundary     = 0,
  show_median  = TRUE,
  output_dir   = hist_dir
)
```

```{r overall-el}
# EL overall
make_histogram(
  df       = df_el,
  variable = "annual_electricity_total",
  x_label  = "Annual Electricity Consumption (kWh)",
  output_file = "hist_electricity_el_overall.pdf",
  binwidth     = 10000,
  boundary     = 0,
  show_median  = TRUE,
  output_dir   = hist_dir
)
```


# By Treatment Status

```{r treatment-bl}
# BL by treatment - all groups
make_histogram(
  df           = df_bl_all,
  variable     = "annual_electricity_total",
  group_var    = "treated",
  group_labels = list("0" = "Control", "1" = "Treatment"),
  x_label      = "Annual Electricity Consumption (kWh)",
  output_file  = "hist_electricity_bl_by_treatment.pdf",
  binwidth     = 10000,
  boundary     = 0,
  show_median  = TRUE,
  output_dir   = hist_dir
)
```

```{r treatment-bl-sample}
# BL by treatment - sample with BL and EL data
make_histogram(
  df           = df_bl_sample,
  variable     = "annual_electricity_total",
  group_var    = "treated",
  group_labels = list("0" = "Control", "1" = "Treatment"),
  x_label      = "Annual Electricity Consumption (kWh)",
  output_file  = "hist_electricity_bl_by_treatment_sample.pdf",
  binwidth     = 10000,
  boundary     = 0,
  show_median  = TRUE,
  output_dir   = hist_dir
)
```

```{r treatment-el}
# EL by treatment
make_histogram(
  df           = df_el,
  variable     = "annual_electricity_total",
  group_var    = "treated",
  group_labels = list("0" = "Control", "1" = "Treatment"),
  x_label      = "Annual Electricity Consumption (kWh)",
  output_file  = "hist_electricity_el_by_treatment.pdf",
  binwidth     = 10000,
  boundary     = 0,
  show_median  = TRUE,
  output_dir   = hist_dir
)
```

# By Faculty

```{r faculty-bl}
# BL by faculty - all groups
make_histogram(
  df          = df_bl_all,
  variable    = "annual_electricity_total",
  group_var   = "MNF",
  group_labels = list("0" = "Medicine or Joint", "1" = "Science"),
  x_label     = "Annual Electricity Consumption (kWh)",
  output_file = "hist_electricity_bl_by_faculty.pdf",
  binwidth     = 10000,
  boundary     = 0,
  show_median  = TRUE,
  output_dir   = hist_dir
)
```

```{r faculty-bl-sample}
# BL by faculty - sample with BL and EL data
make_histogram(
  df          = df_bl_sample,
  variable    = "annual_electricity_total",
  group_var   = "MNF",
  group_labels = list("0" = "Medicine or Joint", "1" = "Science"),
  x_label     = "Annual Electricity Consumption (kWh)",
  output_file = "hist_electricity_bl_by_faculty_sample.pdf",
  binwidth     = 10000,
  boundary     = 0,
  show_median  = TRUE,
  output_dir   = hist_dir
)
```

```{r faculty-el}
# EL by faculty
make_histogram(
  df          = df_el,
  variable    = "annual_electricity_total",
  group_var   = "MNF",
  group_labels = list("0" = "Medicine or Joint", "1" = "Science"),
  x_label     = "Annual Electricity Consumption (kWh)",
  output_file = "hist_electricity_el_by_faculty.pdf",
  binwidth     = 10000,
  boundary     = 0,
  show_median  = TRUE,
  output_dir   = hist_dir
)
```


# BL vs EL Comparison

```{r bl-vs-el}
# BL vs EL comparison - sample with BL and EL data
make_histogram(
  df          = df_sample,
  variable    = "annual_electricity_total",
  group_var   = "survey",
  x_label     = "Annual Electricity Consumption (kWh)",
  output_file = "hist_electricity_bl_vs_el.pdf",
  binwidth     = 10000,
  boundary     = 0,
  show_median  = TRUE,
  output_dir   = hist_dir
)
```
